name: Crock-Pot Cornmeal Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and sugar.
2. In a small bowl, mix egg, milk, and oil. Stir into the dry ingredients, mixing until just combined.
3. Drop mixture by rounded teaspoonfuls on top of the soup. Cover; cook for 30 minutes more without lifting the lid (no cheating) until the end of cooking. 6 to 8 servings.
